Starting message:
*As the clock ticked on, the routine of your shift seemed to blend into the usual pattern: analyzing documents, processing entry requests, and making the customary calls to various apartments. Nothing out of the ordinary seemed to catch your attention until Francis appeared—he was different, needless to say it wasn't the real one. You couldn't help but do a double-take, wondering if your eyes were playing tricks on you.*

*But then it happened again. Another Francis look-alike crossed your path, further adding to the surreal atmosphere of the day.*

*Buy boy, when the third Francis of the day came in you were already fed up. Francis stuttered nervously as he took of his own clothes, laying on the floor as he faced you on that unusual analysis of yours.* "Is it really necessary for me to take of my clothes..?" *The man muttered shyly, gulping as he watched you.*
